about.title: About Me
about.name: Pantelis Stanimeros
about.description1: Based in Thessaloniki, I hold a Bachelor's in Computer Science and an MSc in AI & Data Analytics. I build AI agents, automations, mobile apps, and custom dashboards, tools that save time, cut costs, and help businesses make better decisions every day.
about.description2: I also tackle harder business problems: finding the best schedule when there are hundreds of constraints, training AI on your own data, or building a system that picks the optimal route, allocation, or plan automatically. If it's a problem that costs your business time or money, there's likely a smart solution for it.

packages.footer: You will get a quote within 24 hours. We'll guide you end-to-end.

hosting.question: How does an AI agent actually work for my business?
hosting.answer: An AI agent is a program that handles tasks automatically on your behalf, answering customer questions, processing requests, sending follow-ups, or running internal workflows. You define what it should do, and it runs 24/7 without needing someone to manage it manually. Think of it as a team member that never sleeps and never makes the same mistake twice.

googleBusiness.question: Do I need technical knowledge to use what you build?
googleBusiness.answer: Not at all. Everything is built with the end user in mind, whether that's you, your team, or your customers. You get a simple interface to manage things, and I handle all the technical complexity behind the scenes. If something needs explaining, I'll walk you through it in plain language.

eshopPlatforms.question: What kind of data do I need to train an AI on my business?
eshopPlatforms.answer: It depends on what you want the AI to do. For a customer support agent, your existing documents, FAQs, or product descriptions are enough. For predictions or recommendations, historical records like past orders, schedules, or outcomes work well. You don't need a huge dataset, even a few hundred records can be a good starting point. We'll assess what you have and what's possible.

customization.question: What kind of problems can you solve with optimization?
customization.answer: Any problem where you're trying to find the best arrangement, schedule, or allocation, and doing it manually takes too long or gives poor results. Common examples: employee scheduling with shift constraints, delivery route planning, matching resources to tasks, or deciding the optimal mix of products or services. If it feels like a puzzle your business solves repeatedly, it can likely be automated and optimized.

hiddenFees.question: Are there any hidden fees?
hiddenFees.answer: No hidden fees. All costs are discussed and agreed upfront before any work begins. If your project requires third-party services like cloud hosting or AI API usage, those are explained clearly so you know exactly what you're paying for.

timeToLaunch.question: How long does it take to build and deploy?
timeToLaunch.answer: A focused AI agent or automation can be up and running in 1–2 weeks. Custom apps and dashboards typically take 3–6 weeks depending on complexity. Optimization systems vary based on the problem. After the free strategy call, you'll get a clear timeline before committing to anything.

why.title: Sound familiar?
why.subtitle: These are the problems businesses come to me with. If any of them resonate, there's a smarter way to handle them.

repetitive.title: Your team is doing the same tasks every day
repetitive.description: Answering the same customer questions, copying data between systems, chasing follow-ups manually. These tasks eat hours that could go somewhere useful.

decisions.title: Decisions are made on gut feeling, not data
decisions.description: You have data sitting in spreadsheets, systems, or nowhere at all, and no easy way to turn it into something actionable. So decisions rely on instinct instead.

scheduling.title: Scheduling and planning is a constant headache
scheduling.description: Fitting people, resources, or deliveries into the right slots, with all the constraints involved, takes hours and still ends up suboptimal.

visibility.title: You have no clear picture of what's happening
visibility.description: Numbers are scattered, reports are manual, and by the time you see a problem it's already cost you. You need one place that shows what matters, in real time.

why.ctaAfter: for all of this. See how.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.paragraph1: This Privacy Policy describes how Stanimeros ("we," "us," or "our") collects, uses, and shares your personal information when you use our mobile applications and services.
introduction.paragraph1App: This Privacy Policy describes how {{developer}} ("we," "us," or "our") collects, uses, and shares your personal information when you use {{appName}} and related services.
introduction.paragraph2: By using the app, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.

personalInformation.title: Personal Information
personalInformation.description: We may collect personal information such as your name, email address, and device information when you use the app.

locationData.title: Location Data
locationData.description: The app may access your device's location data to provide location-based services and features. Specifically:

items.title: Background Location
items.description: When you have granted the "Allow all the time" location permission, the app may collect your GPS coordinates continuously in the background. This is required to enable location-based features of the service.

items.title: Who can see your location
items.description: Your location data is visible only to authorized users within your account or organization. It is never shared with or sold to any third parties.

items.title: Storage
items.description: Location data is transmitted securely and stored within our cloud infrastructure, using industry-standard security practices.

items.title: Retention
items.description: Location data is retained for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide the service. You may request deletion by contacting us.

items.title: Opting out
items.description: You can revoke background location access at any time through your device settings. Go to Settings → Apps, select the app, then Permissions → Location. Revoking access will disable location-dependent features.

usageData.title: Usage Data
usageData.description: We collect information about how you use the app, including features accessed, time spent, and performance data.

deviceInformation.title: Device Information
deviceInformation.description: We may collect device-specific information such as device model, operating system version, and unique device identifiers.

howWeUseInformation.title: How We Use Your Information
items: To provide and maintain the app and services
To improve and personalize your experience
To communicate with you about updates and features
To analyze usage patterns and optimize performance
To ensure security and prevent fraud

informationSharing.title: Information Sharing
informationSharing.description: We do not sell your personal information. Your data is never sold to third parties. We do not share your personal information with any third parties under any circumstances.

apiKeys.title: API Keys and Service Account Keys
apiKeys.paragraph1: We do not collect, store, or share any API keys or service account keys. Any API keys or service account keys that you may use with our services are your sole responsibility.
apiKeys.paragraph2: We are not liable for any lost API keys, service account keys, or any billing charges incurred through the use of your keys. You are solely responsible for your actions and the use of your API keys and service account keys, including any associated costs, charges, or consequences resulting from their use.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.description: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information:
items: Encryption of data in transit and at rest

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.description: You have the following rights regarding your personal information:
items: Object to processing of your data

dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.description: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law.

childrensPrivacy.title: Children's Privacy
childrensPrivacy.description: This app is not intended for children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.

changesToPolicy.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
changesToPolicy.description: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.description: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

dataDeletionLink.description: To request deletion of your data, please visit our data deletion page.

dataDeletion.title: Request Data Deletion
dataDeletion.subtitle: Submit a request to delete your personal data from the app

importantInformation.title: Important Information
items: Data deletion is permanent and cannot be undone
This process may take up to 30 days to complete
We may need to verify your identity before processing

accountDeletionPolicy.title: Account Deletion Request - {{appName}}
accountDeletionPolicy.intro: We value your privacy and provide a simple way for you to manage your data.
accountDeletionPolicy.appIntro: If you are a user of the {{appName}} application and wish to delete your account and all associated data, please follow the instructions below:
accountDeletionPolicy.howToIntro: You can request account deletion in either of the following ways:
accountDeletionPolicy.howToOptionEmail: Contact us by email at {{email}} with the subject line "Account Deletion Request" and include the email address or username associated with your {{appName}} account.
accountDeletionPolicy.howToOptionForm: Fill out the Data Deletion Request form at the end of this page.
accountDeletionPolicy.whatDataIntro: Upon receiving your request, we will delete the following data from our servers within 30 days:
dataItems: Any user-generated content associated with your account
accountDeletionPolicy.note: Note: Some data may be retained for a limited period if required by law or for legitimate security purposes.

form.title: Data Deletion Request Form
form.appNamePlaceholder: Enter the name of the application
form.reasonPlaceholder: Please explain why you want to delete your data...
form.deleteAccount: I also want to delete my account (authentication credentials) in addition to my data
form.confirm: I understand that this action is permanent and cannot be undone. I confirm that I want to delete all my personal data from the specified application.
form.verify: I confirm that I am the rightful owner of this account and have the authority to request data deletion.

contact.description: Need help or have questions about data deletion?

privacyPolicyLink.description: To learn how we handle your data, please read our privacy policy.

success.title: Request Submitted Successfully
success.description: Thank you for your data deletion request. We have received your submission and will process it within 30 days as required by data protection regulations.
steps: We will review your request and verify your identity within 3-5 business days.
You will receive a confirmation email with a reference number for tracking.
Your data will be permanently deleted within 30 days of verification.
You will receive a final confirmation email once deletion is complete.
